---
title: "grayleafspotr Workflow Notebook"
output:
  html_notebook:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## 1. Load the package

```{r}
pkg_root <- if (file.exists("DESCRIPTION")) "." else ".."
Sys.setenv(GRAYLEAFSPOTR_PYTHON = file.path(pkg_root, "rvenv_arm_311", "bin", "python"))
options(grayleafspotr.python = NULL)
files <- list.files(file.path(pkg_root, "R"), pattern = "[.]R$", full.names = TRUE)
for (f in files) source(f)
grayleafspot_python_executable(engine_model = "localunet")
grayleafspot_python_available(engine_model = "localunet")
```

## 2. Confirm the example data

```{r}
example_dir <- file.path(pkg_root, "inst", "extdata", "example")
list.files(example_dir)
```

## 3. Load saved example results

```{r}
example_run <- read_grayleafspot_results(example_dir)
example_run$run
example_run$results
```

## 4. Generate template plots from the example run

```{r}
plot_colony_expansion(example_run)
plot_growth_roughness(example_run)
plot_stress_remodeling(example_run)
plot_texture_organization(example_run)
plot_shape_vs_stress(example_run)
plot_feature_heatmap(example_run)
plot_radial_profile(example_run)
```

## 5. Run the Python analysis pipeline on a real image folder

```{r}
if (grayleafspot_python_available(engine_model = "localunet")) {
  real_run <- grayleafspot_analyze(
    input_dir = file.path(pkg_root, "input_images", "06FEB"),
    output_dir = file.path(pkg_root, "outputs"),
    filenames = c(
      "20260210_P001_06-FEB_WT_PCBM_SUB_d04_TOP.jpg",
      "20260212_P001_06-FEB_WT_PCBM_SUB_d06_TOP.jpg",
      "20260216_P001_06-FEB_WT_PCBM_SUB_d10_TOP.jpg"
    ),
    save_outputs = TRUE,
    verbose = FALSE,
    engine_model = "localunet"
  )
  real_run$run
  real_run$results
} else {
  message("Python ML dependencies are not installed, so this step reuses the example run.")
  real_run <- example_run
  real_run$run
  real_run$results
}
```

## 6. Inspect a saved analysis run

```{r}
saved_run <- read_grayleafspot_results(real_run$run$outputDir)
saved_run$run
saved_run$results
```

## 7. Convert the run to tidy data

```{r}
growth_data <- as_grayleafspot_growth_data(example_run)
growth_data
```

## 8. Custom plotting

```{r}
plot_colony_expansion(example_run) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Custom colony expansion view")
```

## 9. Clean up notebook outputs

```{r}
if (dir.exists(file.path(pkg_root, "outputs"))) {
  unlink(file.path(pkg_root, "outputs"), recursive = TRUE, force = TRUE)
}
```
